title: Lucid names new CEO as it raises over $1 billion and ramps up robotaxi ambitions
text: Lucid Names New CEO, Raises Over $1 Billion, Ramps Robotaxi Ambitions. CEO Announcement. Lucid Motors announced the appointment of Silvio Napoli as CEO, ending over a year-long search for a permanent chief executive following Peter Rawlinson's resignation. Capital Raise. The company raised over $1 billion in fresh funding from Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund affiliate and Uber. This capital injection extended the company's runway and provided resources for continued operations and strategic initiatives. Robotaxi Partnership. Lucid expanded its robotaxi partnership with Uber to at least 35,000 vehicles, up from the previous 20,000-vehicle commitment. The expanded partnership includes both the Gravity SUV and Lucid's upcoming midsize vehicles. Strategic Focus. The new CEO is expected to bring cost discipline and operational efficiency to the company, with a focus on achieving profitability and scaling production efficiently.
